museum.name: Virtual Art Museum
museum.tagline: A walk-through collection of contemporary paintings
museum.author: Therese Poller

artworks.title: Silent Horizon
artworks.description: A cool band of color settles over a calm foreground, creating a quiet moment between day and night. The layered brushwork softens the edges and invites slow looking.

artworks.title: City After Rain
artworks.description: Loose reflections and broken light suggest wet streets and distant facades. The painting balances movement and stillness, as if the city is breathing after a storm.

artworks.title: Grey Morning Study
artworks.medium: acrylic paint on a wooden board
artworks.description: Muted tones build a compact scene where light arrives gently from one side. Fine tonal shifts create depth without sharp contrast, giving the image a meditative weight.

artworks.title: Standing Figure in Blue
artworks.description: An elongated silhouette rises against a textured field of blue and ash. The posture feels both fragile and determined, turning a simple shape into a human presence.

artworks.title: Low Tide Plain
artworks.description: Broad horizontal strokes describe open ground and a distant line of sky. Subtle warm accents within cool colors hint at late sunlight touching wet earth.

artworks.title: Indigo Dancer
artworks.artist: Therese Poller together with her granddaughter, who was 9 years old at the time
artworks.description: A vertical composition captures a figure-like motion wrapped in indigo and teal. Energetic marks around the body suggest music, rhythm, and a fleeting turn in space.

artworks.title: Path Through Pines
artworks.description: Dark vertical trunks frame a pale opening in the distance. The narrow path guides the eye inward, turning a compact format into an unexpectedly deep landscape.

artworks.title: Portrait in a Narrow Room
artworks.medium: acrylic paint on small piece of wood
artworks.description: The tall, slim format compresses space around a solitary head and shoulders. Soft transitions in skin and wall tones create intimacy while preserving a quiet emotional distance.

artworks.title: Harbor Light
artworks.description: A broad strip of water reflects pale yellow and steel blue. Simplified silhouettes of boats and piers hold the horizon, giving the scene a calm, maritime clarity.

artworks.title: Evening Window
artworks.description: Interior darkness meets a glowing rectangle of dusk outside. The contrast is gentle rather than dramatic, emphasizing the tender pause between work, light, and rest.

artworks.title: Open Meadow with Wind
artworks.medium: acrylic paint on Closet back side
artworks.description: Long, directional brush marks suggest grass bending under steady wind. A high sky and sparse color palette make the landscape feel expansive, clean, and quietly alive.

artworks.title: Room of Echoes
artworks.description: Layered planes imply walls, doorway, and shadow without strict geometry. The arrangement feels architectural yet dreamlike, as if memory has replaced exact perspective.

artworks.title: Amber Afternoon
artworks.description: Ochre, coral, and muted red build a warm atmosphere like late sunlight on plaster. Transparent layers let earlier tones shimmer through, creating depth and gentle heat.

artworks.title: Night Passage
artworks.description: Deep umber and charcoal masses are interrupted by a thin bright line that leads the eye forward. The composition suggests movement through darkness toward uncertain light.

artworks.title: Still Water, Pale Sky
artworks.description: Minimal shifts between blue-grey bands create a tranquil waterscape. The restrained palette and soft edges slow perception, encouraging sustained attention to subtle atmospheric change.

artworks.title: Pocket Garden
artworks.description: This intimate format captures a cluster of leaves and blossoms with quick, confident marks. Bright accents emerge from earthy underlayers, giving the small painting lively presence.

artworks.title: Rhythm in Ochre
artworks.description: Repeating arcs and vertical strokes set up a visual beat across the surface. Warm ochre tones are balanced by cooler notes, producing a dynamic but cohesive abstraction.

artworks.title: Edge of the Valley
artworks.description: Foreground textures break into lighter slopes and a distant ridge line. The image feels like a remembered walk, where terrain and mood merge into one clear impression.
